questions.q: Write a notice for the school notice board informing students about the upcoming annual function to be held on 15th March.
questions.answer: NOTICE. Annual Function. The annual function of our school will be held on 15th March. All students are requested to participate in the function. The function will include cultural events, prize distribution and a speech by the chief guest. Students are required to reach the venue by 9:00 am sharp. For more information, contact the school office.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: A notice is a _______________ piece of information intended to inform a large number of people about a particular issue or event.
Write a notice for the college notice board regarding a blood donation camp to be organised on 20th February.
questions.answer: NOTICE. Blood Donation Camp. A blood donation camp will be organised in our college on 20th February. All students and staff members are requested to participate in the camp. The camp will be held from 10:00 am to 2:00 pm. Donors will be given a certificate and a refreshment. For more information, contact the college office.

questions.q: What is the purpose of writing a notice? Choose the correct option.
questions.answer: to inform a large number of people about a particular issue or event

questions.q: True or False: A notice should be written in an informal tone.
Write a notice for the school notice board regarding a debate competition to be held on 10th January.
questions.answer: NOTICE. Debate Competition. A debate competition will be held in our school on 10th January. The topic for the debate is 'Social Media: Boon or Bane'. All students are invited to participate in the competition. The competition will be held from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm. For more information, contact the school office.

questions.q: What are the essential elements of a notice? Choose the correct options.
Fill in the blank: The language used in a notice should be _______________ and clear.
Write a notice for the office notice board regarding a meeting to be held on 25th December.
questions.answer: NOTICE. Meeting. A meeting will be held in the office on 25th December. All employees are requested to attend the meeting. The meeting will be held from 10:00 am to 12:00 pm. For more information, contact the office manager.

questions.q: What is the difference between a notice and an advertisement? Choose the correct option.
questions.answer: a notice is used to inform people about an event or issue, while an advertisement is used to promote a product or service
